Common questions

Everything you need
to know.

What makes Mocha different from other interview prep?
Most tools give you generic feedback. Mocha scores your answer on the exact four dimensions McKinsey, Goldman, and Google interviewers actually use: Structure, Clarity, Ownership, Impact. You get a number, a breakdown of where you lost points, and a rewritten version of your answer at the standard that gets the offer. Career centers can't do that. ChatGPT doesn't know what a 9.1 looks like.
Is it actually free?
Yes, genuinely. One session a day with full firm-grade scoring, STAR breakdown, and a shareable score card. No credit card, no trial clock. 1,600 students found Mocha before we even launched. Pro is $9 a month for unlimited sessions, your university ranking, and the rewritten answer at offer standard.
How much time does it take?
Five minutes. One question, your answer, instant score and feedback. No booking, no scheduling. Students use it on their commute, between classes, before bed. 74% come back the next day on their own. The students who get McKinsey offers have done 50 reps. Mocha makes that feel like nothing.
I am not applying to McKinsey. Does this work for me?
Completely. Eight tracks: Consulting, Banking, Tech and Product, Finance and PE, Healthcare, Nonprofit, Design, and Marketing. Each one is calibrated to how that specific firm interviews. Students at Beats By Dre, L'Oréal, the State Department, and Google have all used Mocha to prepare. If you have a behavioral interview, Mocha is for you.
